parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor with natural movements, facial expressions, and lighting. There are no AI artifacts like distorted fingers or uncanny facial features.

characters.appearance: Asian male, mid-30s, medium build, light complexion. He has short, graying hair and a slight mustache and goatee.

scenes.setting: Dimly lit room, possibly a home office or studio, with dark soundproofing panels on the wall behind him.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is seated in a dark, ergonomic office chair, facing the camera directly. He holds a black smartphone in his left hand. Initially, he holds the phone near his mouth as if recording a voice note, then lowers it to his lap. He maintains eye contact with the camera while speaking. The background is a dimly lit room, featuring dark, textured soundproofing panels on the wall behind him. A portion of a desk and a laptop are faintly visible in the background to his left. The lighting is soft and focused on his face, creating a slight contrast with the dark surroundings.

scenes.visual_description: The scene opens with Character A speaking directly to the audience about his English pronunciation journey. He is framed in a medium close-up shot within a dimly lit room. As he speaks, various app UI elements and text overlays dynamically appear on the screen. These overlays include a circular progress bar showing a score of 81% and a speech level chart indicating his proficiency. The text overlays emphasize his realization that he needed to improve his English. The combination of his direct address and the graphical elements sets up the problem the app solves.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I would love to have dinner with my friends.
Character A says: I thought my English was really good.
Character A says: But then I did BoldVoice's SpeechScan, and I realized I had a lot to improve on.

The visual focus is entirely on the interactive learning process facilitated by the app.

scenes.visual_description: Character A speaks enthusiastically to the camera, sharing his positive experience and recommending the app to the viewers. As he talks, app UI overlays appear, displaying a radar chart of his skills and a pitch contour graph. Large text overlays highlight the key benefits, such as the short practice time required. The visual elements reinforce his spoken message about the app's effectiveness. The scene concludes with a call to action and the display of the BoldVoice brand logo.
